scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,electron -c cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=packages/backend" "npm run dev --workspace=packages/frontend" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && npx tsc --project packages/electron/tsconfig.json && electron packages/electron/dist/main.js"
scripts.electron:clean: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('install/release', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('packages/electron/release', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npx tsc --project packages/electron/tsconfig.json
scripts.electron:pack: npm run electron:clean && npm run electron:build && npm run pack --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.electron:dist: npm run electron:clean && npm run electron:build && npm run dist --workspace=packages/electron && node scripts/organize-electron-release.cjs
